Introduction
============

Welcome to gRINN (get Residue Interaction Energies and Networks).

gRINN is a software tool for the calculation of pairwise amino acid non-bonded interaction energies from NAMD or GROMACS generated Molecular Dynamics (MD) simulation trajectories by interoperating with NAMD/GMX simulation engines.

In additon to the calculation of interaction energies, equal-time linear correlations between interaction energy time series is featured as well.

Finally, a rich visualization interface allows you to view pairwise interaction energies alongside an embedded PyMol molecular viewer. 
A feature for Protein Energy Network construction and visualization of simple residue-based local network metrics (Degrees, Betweenness Centrality and Closeness Centrality) 
as well as Shortest Path finding is provided as well.
